calendar.description: Personal and work calendar export. Night-shift schedule, nothing scheduled before noon without approval.

shift.name: Dinner service
shift.note: Later finish on Friday and Saturday at 100 plus covers.

dayoff.name: Family day
dayoff.note: Sunday dinner at Angela's in Bayonne. Grandma Rose's gravy, homemade pasta, braciole.

dayoff.name: Real day off
dayoff.note: Coffee with Frank most Mondays. Evening with Tony.

event.title: Dental recall, overdue cleaning
event.note: They hold a few later slots that work with kitchen hours.

event.title: Spice order arrives
event.note: Single origin order, research for the pantry.

event.title: Grandma Rose 87th birthday
event.note: Pick up the rum cake at the bakery counter by 11. The good one, like last year.

event.title: Hudson Valley sourcing trip
event.location: Greenfield Farm Market and Fontana Creamery
event.note: Rental booked. Fall produce, butter and ricotta order, two new grower visits for Rootstock.

event.title: Investor dinner, D. Castellano
event.note: Bring the deck. Do not share full financials before the meeting.

event.title: Annual physical with Dr. Lam
event.note: Repeat fasting lipid panel. Watch the cholesterol.

event.title: Space viewing, 214 Elm Street
event.note: With the leasing agent. Frank's pick, hood and grease trap in place.

event.title: Open enrollment begins, renters and health
event.note: Health premium and renters policy both renew around now.

event.title: Financial model review
event.note: Finish the three year projections before this. Then get SBA pre-qualified.

event.title: Menu development, days-off cooking
event.note: Lock the scallop garnish and the tasting pasta before the holidays.
